notes.author: run-scenario-agent
notes.text: Verified all-movers → 4 survivors. Evidence: scenario_summary "scenario \"scenario2\" completed; 4/4 bots survived." with complete=true, matching plan's expected_survivors=4.

notes.author: run-scenario-agent
notes.text: Re-run to validate the new termination_metadata.final_state path. runScenarioWithBots now reads final_state.survivor_count directly from response.json instead of log-grepping. Result: complete=true, survivors=4 (scenario_summary: "scenario \"scenario2\" completed; 4/4 bots survived."). All 4 movers reached room2, scenario terminated with 4 living players, and the count came through the new payload cleanly. Scenario-script log evidence of all 4 bots joining and the room being driven to completion: "[MultiplayerRoom:scenario2] +player ae2b6c9c-6cf9-41fa-a187-7e0fac80eefe (total:4)" — followed by clean termination (no scenario_script_errors, no websocket_errors). The new survivor_count reading agrees with the expected outcome (4).
